scope_summary: Figure 2 – Former Kim Beazley School Site; - 1.3 – Communal open space; 1.1.1 Dwellings shall be setback from the primary street and secondary street(s); 1.2.1 A minimum of 20% of Lot 2 shall be set aside for communal open space; 1.3.1 Developments shall provide a contiguous and activated built form frontage
